text:
| Automated Execution in SIT             | 0% SIT  Automated                                                                                                       | 80% SIT  Automated                                                                                                                                     | 100% SIT automated execution                         |
| Automated Execution in ST              | 73% ST  Automated                                                                                                       | 100 % ST Automated (Unattended execution)                                                                                                              | 100% ST execution was automated                      |
| Reduction of Environment Defects       | 40% SIT Defects Related to Environment                                                                                  | 3% SIT Defects Related to Environment                                                                                                                  | 10% SIT Defects Related to Environment               |
| User Points delivered for Path to Live | 3-5 Story Points Estimated Per User Story                                                                               | 1 Story Point Per User Story                                                                                                                           | To be implemented                                    |
| How we did it                          | Introduced new metrics and execution dashboards for transparency. Refactored and strengthened the automation framework. | Embedded automation across teams for broader adoption. Established consistent, synchronized ways of working. Resolved critical test environment issues | Enabled smoke testing with API automation framework. |  
logo
name: Chunk 8/8

raw_entities.name: Automated Execution in SIT
raw_entities.description: The capability to execute software testing in the System Integration Testing (SIT) environment automatically. The document tracks its progression from 0% to 100% automation coverage across multiple phases. This represents a core operational capability delivered to the client.

raw_entities.name: Automated Execution in ST
raw_entities.description: The capability to execute software testing in the System Testing (ST) environment automatically. It achieved unattended execution and reached 100% automation status. This capability directly supports faster release cycles and reduced manual effort.

raw_entities.name: Reduction of Environment Defects
raw_entities.description: A measurable reduction in defects originating from the test environment, dropping from 40% to 3% and stabilizing at 10%. This outcome indicates significantly improved environment stability and testing quality. The reduction directly addresses prior environmental instability.

raw_entities.name: User Story Point Efficiency
aliases: Story Points delivered for Path to Live
raw_entities.description: A significant improvement in development and testing efficiency, reducing estimated story points per user story from 3-5 down to 1. This efficiency gain streamlines the path to production and reduces delivery overhead. The metric reflects optimized team velocity and process maturity.
context: User Points delivered for Path to Live
3-5 Story Points Estimated Per User Story

raw_entities.name: Automation Framework
raw_entities.description: A refactored and strengthened software testing framework used to enable automated execution. It serves as the technical foundation for both SIT and ST automation efforts. The framework also supports advanced use cases like API-driven smoke testing.
context: Refactored and strengthened the automation framework.
Enabled smoke testing with API automation framework.

raw_entities.name: Execution Dashboards & Metrics
raw_entities.description: The introduction of new metrics and execution dashboards designed to provide transparency into testing progress. These tools track automation status and execution performance in real time. They enable data-driven decision making for the delivery teams.
context: Introduced new metrics and execution dashboards for transparency.

raw_entities.name: Critical Test Environment Issues
raw_entities.description: Significant problems and defects within the test environment that required active resolution. These issues previously hindered automation adoption and contributed to high defect rates. Resolving them was a prerequisite for achieving stable automated execution.

raw_entities.name: Synchronized Ways of Working
raw_entities.description: The establishment of consistent, synchronized operational processes embedded across teams. This approach supports broader automation adoption and ensures reliable execution. It represents a key methodological differentiator in the delivery model.
context: Established consistent, synchronized ways of working.

raw_entities.name: Smoke Testing
raw_entities.description: The application of automated API frameworks to perform smoke testing. This use case ensures rapid validation of core system functionality before full execution. It leverages the underlying automation framework for immediate feedback.
context: Enabled smoke testing with API automation framework.
